top_strength: Frank ran an exceptionally thorough probe — inventory list, walking distance visualization, floor details, variable pricing explanation — and the customer felt heard and informed.
coaching_note: Save Your Ass is the biggest gap — 17-minute call with a highly prepared customer who mentioned vacuum-sealing everything was the perfect setup for the full prep speech.
phone_presence_notes: Frank used affirming language naturally, showed patience during the email confusion, and used the car-length visualization technique that landed well.
